mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bookmark WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_img AS reviewImg, m.member_name AS memberName FROM bookmark b JOIN review r ON r.review_id = b.review_id JOIN member m ON m.member_id = r.member_id WHERE b.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY b.bookmark_created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
